expectations.text: Migrated file no longer imports terraform-plugin-sdk/v2
Uses timeouts.Block(...) inside Blocks (preserves HCL block syntax) — NOT timeouts.Attributes
expectations.evidence: timeouts.Block: True; timeouts.Attributes (wrong for migration): False

expectations.text: Typed model has a Timeouts field of type timeouts.Value with tfsdk:"timeouts" tag
Create / Delete methods invoke plan.Timeouts.Create(ctx, ...) or .Delete(ctx, ...) and use the resulting context
